steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Command of Evidence question using a table. The blank must complete a comparison between the tribal industry's contribution and the contributions of arts/entertainment/recreation and professional services — use the table values to decide which comparison is accurate.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — was greater than the contribution made by professional services but equal to that made by arts/entertainment/recreation.: The table shows the tribal contribution is not equal to arts/entertainment/recreation, and it does not exceed professional services. Both claims are wrong. ✗
  • Choice B — exceeded the contribution made by both arts/entertainment/recreation and professional services.: The table shows the tribal contribution is less than professional services, so it cannot have exceeded both. ✗
  • Choice C — was lower than the contribution made by either arts/entertainment/recreation or professional services.: The table shows the tribal contribution is greater than arts/entertainment/recreation, so this is wrong. ✗
  • Choice D — surpassed the contribution made by arts/entertainment/recreation but fell short of that made by professional services.: This matches the table exactly — the tribal contribution is higher than arts/entertainment/recreation and lower than professional services. ✓
That matches Choice D — surpassed the contribution made by arts/entertainment/recreation but fell short of that made by professional services..
